withdrawalBypass.note2: I tentativi di prelievo che usano il bypass sono contrassegnati in withdrawal_attempt_logs
withdrawalBypass.note3: Il bypass NON sovrascrive i limiti del piano (si applicano ancora gli importi min/max di prelievo)

1.title: What Is ProfitChips?
1.subtitle: Your Gateway to Earning with AI
1.description: {{platformName}} is a revolutionary platform that connects you with AI training tasks, enabling you to earn real money by contributing to the advancement of artificial intelligence.

whyBullets.1: No specialized skills required - just basic comprehension and attention to detail
whyBullets.2: Work from anywhere with an internet connection
whyBullets.3: Flexible hours - work at your own pace
whyBullets.4: Transparent earnings and straightforward payment system

2.title: How You Earn
2.subtitle: Simple Tasks, Real Rewards
2.earningPotentialSuffix: per week with an upgraded account
2.description: Every task you complete correctly earns you money that goes directly into your earnings wallet. Your earning rate depends on your membership plan.

1.title: Complete AI Tasks
1.description: Review AI responses and select the best answer

2.title: Earn Instantly
2.description: Get paid immediately for correct answers

3.title: Withdraw Weekly
3.description: Cash out your earnings on designated payout days

3.title: Types of Tasks
3.subtitle: Variety of AI Microtasks
3.description: {{platformName}} offers diverse AI training tasks that help improve machine learning models. Each task is simple but contributes to advancing AI technology.

chatbot.title: Chatbot Training
chatbot.description: Evaluate AI responses to conversations and select the most natural, helpful answers.

sentiment.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentiment.description: Review text snippets and help AI understand human emotions and opinions accurately.

classification.title: Content Classification
classification.description: Categorize and label content to help AI learn to organize information effectively.

dataQuality.title: Data Quality Review
dataQuality.description: Validate AI-generated responses for accuracy, relevance, and appropriateness.

bestPractices.title: Email Deliverability Best Practices
bestPractices.subtitle: Ensure your emails reach recipients and avoid spam filters

domainVerification.title: Required: Domain Verification (SPF/DKIM)
domainVerification.description: To prevent emails from going to spam, you must verify your domain with Resend and configure SPF/DKIM records.

step1.title: 1. Add your domain in Resend
step1.description: Go to Resend Dashboard → Domains → Add Domain

step2.title: 2. Add DNS records to your domain
step2.description: Add the SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records provided by Resend

step3.title: 3. Wait for verification
step3.description: DNS propagation can take up to 48 hours

currentConfiguration.title: Current Email Configuration
currentConfiguration.note: Email settings are configured in Email Settings under Communications

spamPrevention.title: Spam Prevention Checklist
spamPrevention.tip2: Include unsubscribe links in marketing emails
spamPrevention.tip3: Maintain good text-to-image ratio in email body
spamPrevention.tip4: Avoid spam trigger words (FREE, URGENT, ACT NOW, etc.)
spamPrevention.tip5: Send from a consistent sender name and address
spamPrevention.tip6: Warm up new domains gradually (start with small batches)
spamPrevention.tip7: Monitor bounce rates and remove invalid addresses

contentGuidelines.title: Content Best Practices
contentGuidelines.tip1: Write clear, relevant subject lines (avoid ALL CAPS)
contentGuidelines.tip2: Personalize with recipient's name using variables
contentGuidelines.tip3: Include your company name and address in footer
contentGuidelines.tip4: Balance HTML with plain text alternative
contentGuidelines.tip5: Test emails before sending to large groups
contentGuidelines.tip6: Keep email size under 100KB for best deliverability

monitoring.title: Monitor Your Email Performance
monitoring.description: Use the History tab to track delivery status, monitor bounce rates, and identify issues. Check delivery status regularly using the Resend API integration.

ipstackSettings.title: IPStack Geolocation Settings
ipstackSettings.description: Configure IPStack API key for user IP address and geolocation detection
ipstackSettings.info: IPStack is used to detect user IP addresses and map them to countries during registration and login. Get your API key from
ipstackSettings.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your IPStack API access key
ipstackSettings.apiKeyHint: Your IPStack API access key. This key is stored securely in the database.
ipstackSettings.settingsSavedDescription: IPStack API key has been updated successfully.
ipstackSettings.validationErrorDescription: Please fix the errors before saving.
ipstackSettings.apiKeyRequiredDescription: Please enter an API key before testing.
ipstackSettings.testSuccessMessage: ✅ API key is valid! Test IP (8.8.8.8) resolved to: {{countryName}} ({{countryCode}})
ipstackSettings.testSuccessfulDescription: IPStack API key is working correctly.
ipstackSettings.howItWorks1: IPStack detects user IP addresses during registration and login
ipstackSettings.howItWorks2: IP addresses are mapped to countries and stored in user profiles
ipstackSettings.howItWorks3: Location data is displayed in the admin panel for security monitoring
ipstackSettings.howItWorks4: API calls are cached for 1 hour to reduce usage and improve performance

senderInformation.title: Informazioni mittente

adminEmailSettings.testEmailSent: Email di test inviata con successo! Controlla la tua casella di posta.

verificationReminders.title: Promemoria verifica email
verificationReminders.description: Configura promemoria automatici per utenti che non hanno verificato il proprio indirizzo email
verificationReminders.alertDescription: Queste impostazioni controllano il sistema automatico di promemoria di verifica email. I promemoria vengono inviati tramite la funzione pianificata che viene eseguita quotidianamente.
verificationReminders.enableRemindersDescription: Invia automaticamente promemoria di verifica agli utenti non verificati
verificationReminders.maxReminders: Numero massimo di promemoria per utente
verificationReminders.howItWorksDescription: Primo promemoria inviato dopo {{first}} giorni. Secondo promemoria a {{second}} giorni. Terzo a {{third}} giorni. Poi promemoria ogni {{frequency}} giorni fino a un massimo di {{max}} promemoria.

toasts.errorSavingDescription: Errore nel salvataggio delle impostazioni promemoria

toasts.errorLoadingDescription: Errore nel caricamento delle impostazioni promemoria

toasts.settingsResetDescription: Le impostazioni email sono state ripristinate ai valori predefiniti.

adminLoginMessage.title: Configurazione messaggio di accesso
adminLoginMessage.subtitle: Personalizza il messaggio di benvenuto mostrato dopo l'accesso
adminLoginMessage.howItWorksDescription: Questo messaggio appare in un dialogo dopo l'accesso. Puoi attivarlo/disattivarlo e scegliere se può essere chiuso o mostrato una sola volta per sessione.

confirm.reset: Ripristinare le impostazioni predefinite? Questa azione non può essere annullata.

adminReamazeSettings.title: Impostazioni Chat Live Reamaze

adminReamazeSettings.importantDescription: Il codice di incorporamento verrà iniettato in tutte le pagine quando la chat live è abilitata. Assicurati che il codice sia corretto e formattato correttamente.

enableLiveChat.title: Abilita Chat Live
enableLiveChat.description: Attiva o disattiva il widget di chat live Reamaze su tutta la piattaforma

embedCode.title: Codice di Incorporamento

embedCode.howToGetCode: Come ottenere il tuo codice di incorporamento Reamaze:

adminReamazeSettings.settingsSavedDescription: Le impostazioni della chat live Reamaze sono state aggiornate con successo.
adminReamazeSettings.changesDiscardedDescription: Tutte le modifiche non salvate sono state annullate.

adminEmailTemplateGlobalSettings.title: Modello email globale
adminEmailTemplateGlobalSettings.subtitle: Modifica il modello HTML globale usato per tutte le email inviate dalla piattaforma. Include best practice anti-spam.

template.title: Modello HTML email
template.description: Modifica il modello HTML. La variabile {{content}} verrà sostituita con il corpo dell'email.
template.hint: Questo modello avvolge tutte le email. Includi {{content}} dove deve apparire il corpo.

preview.title: Anteprima email
preview.description: Anteprima del modello con dati di esempio

adminEmailTemplateGlobalSettings.changesNote: Le modifiche si applicano a tutte le email inviate dalla piattaforma dopo il salvataggio.

success.templateSaved: Modello salvato! Tutte le email future useranno questo modello.

toasts.templateSavedDescription: Il modello email globale è stato aggiornato.
